chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S– 192 of 2022 C. P No. S– 22 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of cases 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.550/2022 (S/A) 17.04.2023 Mr. Niazuddin N. Memon, Advocate for the petitioner in C.P. No.S-192/2022 and for respondent No.1 in C.P.No.S-22/2023. Mr. Mudasir Sadar Siddiqui, Advocate for petitioner in C.P.No.S- 22/2023 and for Respondent No.1 in C.P.No.S-192/2022. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> Learned counsel for petitioner in both above listed Constitutional Petitions file statements, which are taken on record. Under statement, learned counsel for petitioner in C.P.No.S-22 of 2023 and for respondent No.1 in C.P.No.S-192 of 2022 mutually accepts reduced maintenance of minor from Rs. 15,000/- to Rs.13,000/- and does not press his petition. While as per his statement, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press C.P.No.S-192 of 2022 further and accept reduced amount of maintenance at Rs.13,000/-. Accordingly, aforementioned Constitutional Petitions stand disposed of along with pending application(s) in terms of statements, filed today by the learned counsel for the parties. Office is directed to place a signed copy of this order in the connected captioned matter. JUDGE Ahmad
